title: Trusty Tools
body:
![Cover image featuring title, description, iron pickaxe laying on the side and an iron sword embedded into the floor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ce0fdbcb34a047511f3308cfd9c60798e4bfaa5.png)

## About
This pack adds fully modeled 3D handheld models for pickaxes, shovels, swords, axes, and hoes, plus a few specials (like bow and mace) in a style similar to other fresh stuff. It also includes a new 2D texture for the shield and so much more. Current compatibility list is available down below.

## Features
- Added handheld models for pickaxes, shovels, swords, axes and hoes
- Added handheld models for bow and crossbow
- Added handheld model for a mace
- Added shield item texture
- Changed item textures for pickaxes, shovels, swords, axes, and hoes
- Changed item textures for bow, crossbow, and arrow
- Changed arrow entity texture

## Compatibility
Coming soon...
